purpose: Deterministic tie-break rules for ambiguous natural-language criteria mapping across columns in VW_DEAL_ORDER_SUMMARY.

decision_logic: If ask is tranche-level or mentions tranche, use TRANCHE_REGION.
If ask is explicitly deal-level region (ECM), DEAL_REGION is acceptable.
The old REGION column has been removed from the view — never emit REGION.
If uncertain, use TRANCHE_REGION as default and include a brief note.
Use PRICING_TS for generic time-window asks unless the user explicitly says settlement.
Use SETTLEMENT_TS only for settlement-specific requests (for example 'settled in').
Investor-side asks map to GPNUM filtering.
Issuer-side asks map to GFCID filtering.
Do not rely on INVESTOR_NAME/ISSUER_NAME LIKE in final SQL once identifier is resolved.
Include IDENTIFIER_TYPE and IDENTIFIER_VALUE in SELECT when requested.
Include TICKER when helpful and available.
DCM order amount semantics map to AMT.
Investor share/allocation semantics map to ALLOCATION.
If user says 'highest share' without more detail, confirm allocation intent then use ALLOCATION.
